prompt: A cozy sunlit home office scene photographed in a realistic lifestyle style. A white short-haired cat with pale green eyes sits upright on a warm wooden desk near the center-left, facing the camera with a calm attentive expression, its tail curled around its front paws. To the left of the cat is 1 leafy potted houseplant in a textured beige pot and 1 ceramic mug filled with dark coffee. In front of the cat lies 1 open spiral notebook with handwritten notes and 1 silver pen resting diagonally across the pages. On the right side of the desk is 1 open laptop angled slightly toward the viewer, showing a vivid wallpaper of a turquoise lake and dramatic snow-capped mountain peaks under a blue sky. Behind the desk is a large window with soft cream curtains, bright golden morning sunlight streaming in from the right and casting natural shadows across the desk. Include 2 framed wall pictures partially visible on the left wall. The atmosphere should feel peaceful, productive, and warmly domestic, with soft cinematic lighting, crisp details, shallow depth of field, and high-end editorial photography realism.
translatedPrompt: 一张温馨且阳光明媚的家庭办公场景，采用写实的生活摄影风格。一只拥有浅绿色眼睛的白色短毛猫端坐在温暖的木质书桌左侧中央，正对着镜头，神情平静而专注，尾巴环绕在两只前爪周围。猫的左侧摆放着 1 盆叶片茂盛的室内盆栽（置于米色纹理花盆中）和 1 个装有黑咖啡的陶瓷马克杯。猫的前方放着 1 本打开的螺旋笔记本，上面写有手写笔记，一支银色钢笔斜放在页面上。书桌右侧是 1 台稍微朝向观众倾斜的笔记本电脑，屏幕上显示着绿松石色湖泊与蓝天下壮丽雪山的生动壁纸。书桌后方是一扇大窗户，挂着柔软的米色窗帘，明亮的金色晨光从右侧射入，在书桌上投下自然的阴影。左侧墙壁上隐约可见 2 幅装裱好的挂画。整体氛围应显得宁静、高效且充满居家温暖感，并具备柔和的电影级光影、清晰的细节、浅景深效果以及高端的编辑摄影质感。

breakdown.creativeCore: 阳光洒满的书桌，白猫与笔记本电脑：此提示词可生成一张温馨且写实的居家生活照片，画面包含阳光下的书桌、白猫、笔记本电脑、咖啡、笔记本和室内盆栽，非常适合用于家庭办公或营造宁静高效的视觉效果。
breakdown.subject: 产品
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 活动海报、品牌主视觉、展览宣传、社媒封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, cinematic, editorial]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: shallow depth, depth of field, camera]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
